tool.name: LangGraph
tool.description: Stateful agent orchestration framework with graph-based execution and durable workflows.
tool.logoNotes: Official LangGraph logo asset from the owner-controlled langchain-ai/langgraph repo (`.github/images/logo-light.svg`).
tool.practitionerNote: Strong option when teams want explicit stateful control over agent flows instead of opaque black-box autonomy.

dataResidency.detail: Self-hosted library; operator controls placement (LangSmith cloud has separate terms).

deployment.detail: OSS library (self-hosted); LangGraph Cloud via LangSmith is an optional SaaS.

auditLogging.detail: No built-in audit log; tracing via LangSmith (separate service); operator implements logging.

soc2.detail: Self-hosted library; SOC 2 applies to the operator's infrastructure, not the package.

iso27001.detail: Self-hosted library; ISO 27001 applies to the operator's ISMS, not the package.

iso42001.detail: Self-hosted library; ISO 42001 applies to the deploying organisation.

euAiAct.detail: Developer component, not an AI system placed on the market; obligations rest with the deployer.
